subcodes.first_line: O spiritual friends and true loved ones! The day is the day of attraction, and this is the morn of effulgence [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران معنوی و احبای حقیقی یوم یوم انجذاب است و روز روز اشراق
subcodes.subjects: @call to action, @spiritual transformation, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @firmness in the Covenant, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
